name: Stanford Pines | Summoning a Succubi
description:
"It's purely out of Scientific curiosity..."

Pre!Bill Stanford summons a Succubi, purely for research purposes.

Since we're getting new gravity falls content I thought I could celebrate by creating a bot specifically for a scenario I've had in my head for quite a while now :)

(If he talks about Dipper or Mabel either generate a new message or delete said part, the LLM has data on who Stanford is and will sometimes try to insert them into the story even if in this timeline they shouldn't even be born yet lol)
creator: Sylphind
